event: found unconscious with signs of multiple trauma
complicated hospital course in the critical care unit
multiple transfusions of packed red blood cells
visible bleeding vessel on anterior wall of duodenal bulb
bipolar cautery applied to oozing pigmented spots
selective arteriograms showed extravasation from right duodenal branch of gastroduodenal artery
spurting vessel (Forrest type 1a) in posterior-inferior portion of duodenal bulb
placement of hemostatic clips not attempted
oversew the ulcer with endoscopic sutures
interrupted suture placed at inferior and superior edges
suture cinched to reduce ulcer size
second running suture placed in parallel
no further bleeding during hospital course
no further gastrointestinal bleeding at one-year follow-up
